message:
test(lint): add comprehensive unit tests for lint package

Provides thorough test coverage for the lint package including:

TestLinterBasic:
- Verifies benign prompts pass without findings
- Checks Stats calculation (ByteCount, LineCount)

TestEstimateTokens:
- Empty string returns 0
- Short strings estimate correctly
- Long strings scale appropriately

TestCheckDestructive:
- Covers rm -rf patterns (root, home, wildcard)
- Covers git destructive patterns (reset --hard, push --force)
- Verifies safe exceptions work (node_modules, dist/, force-with-lease)
- Covers database patterns (DROP TABLE)
- Covers Kubernetes patterns (kubectl delete ns)

TestCheckSize:
- Verifies warnings at threshold
- Verifies errors above max

TestRuleSet:
- Clone creates independent copy
- Enable/Disable/SetSeverity modify correctly
- SetConfig updates rule configuration

TestCheckMissingContext:
- Missing required tags generate findings
- Present tags don't generate findings
- Empty required list is a no-op

TestLinterWithSecrets:
- Integrates with redaction engine
- Generates findings for detected secrets

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
